_comment: Copy to slop.config.json for local dev (it is gitignored). NONE of these are secrets: the Supabase anon key is browser-safe (protected by Row Level Security) and the Google client ID is public. NEVER put a Supabase service_role key or a Google client SECRET here or anywhere in the frontend.
_supabase: Production reads these same PUBLIC values from js/supabase.js. To override locally, set window.SLOP_CONFIG = { supabaseUrl, supabaseAnonKey } before the modules load (see README).
_google: Google OAuth is configured in the Supabase Dashboard (Auth -> Providers -> Google), NOT in the frontend. The client ID below is only used by the legacy node server.js Google button.
_ai: Optional: used by the legacy node server.js AI proxy for cooking games locally.
